name: Ambrosia's Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and flour together until well combined.
2. Beat egg yolks with vanilla and juice separately until smooth.
3. Gradually add the yolk mixture to the butter and flour mixture, alternating with the sifted cake flour, making sure each addition is fully incorporated before adding the next.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with 1 tablespoon sugar until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the beaten white into the butter mixture using a spatula until just combined.
6. Beat the remaining batter on low speed for 4 to 5 minutes to ensure even incorporation of air.
7. Grease and flour two 8x4-inch baking pans.
8. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
9. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before turning off the oven and transferring the cakes onto wire racks to cool completely.
